prompts.prompt: Write a single-sentence headline (max 12 words) for a product launch where a UK payments startup announces a fee cut for small businesses.
In two sentences, explain to a non-technical reader what "latency" means in the context of a web API.
A founder has $150k to either hire one senior engineer or three junior engineers for a year. Give a recommendation in one paragraph.
A regional bookshop must pick one focus for the year: stronger e-commerce, or a programme of in-store author events. Recommend one, with reasoning.
A Python service must process 1M small JSON files on one VM. Recommend asyncio or a process pool, with one paragraph of reasoning.
An internal tool will serve ~50 users with light CRUD traffic. PostgreSQL or SQLite? One paragraph.
Name three distinct primary causes of the 2008 financial crisis. One sentence on each.
Is it ethical for a company to use AI to monitor individual employee productivity? Take a clear position in one paragraph.
